detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SCIENTOLOGY._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#435-499):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#481)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#513-525)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#487)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#563)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#497)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#651)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#631)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#633)
	SCIENTOLOGY._rOwned (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SCIENTOLOGY._takeTeam(uint256) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#645-653)
	- SCIENTOLOGY._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#627-641)
	- SCIENTOLOGY.balanceOf(address) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#353-357)
	- SCIENTOLOGY.constructor() (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#303-317)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#497)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#659)
	SCIENTOLOGY._rTotal (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#251) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SCIENTOLOGY._getCurrentSupply() (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#751-761)
	- SCIENTOLOGY._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#657-663)
	- SCIENTOLOGY.constructor() (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#303-317)
	- SCIENTOLOGY.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#409-417)

	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#581)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#581)

	- SCIENTOLOGY.openTrading() (SCIENTOLOGY.sol#569-595)
